summary: Fixed React runtime error 'Objects are not valid as a React child' that occurred when clicking 详情 on the /admin/import page. The detail body was rendering raw ImportParseWarning objects (e.g. {type, message, recordIndex, ...}) directly as JSX children for pending batches where warningsJson is stored as a JSON-stringified object array. Introduced a defensive formatter helper and updated the detail dialog to use it.

problem.rootCause: ImportBatch.warningsJson is stored in two shapes: (1) pending batches: JSON.stringify(quality.warnings) where quality.warnings is ImportParseWarning[]; (2) confirmed batches: JSON.stringify({version, generatedAt, warnings: string[], crossCohortApprovals}). The detail route's safeJsonParse returns the parsed value verbatim, so client-side batch.warnings can be string[] OR ImportParseWarning[] OR a payload wrapper object. The K34-A detail body rendered warnings with {w}, which crashed when w was an object.
problem.userImpact: ADMIN users could not view any import batch detail. The detail dialog crashed on every click. K34-A manual validation was blocked.
problem.errorMessage: Objects are not valid as a React child (found: object with keys {type, message, recordIndex, className, courseName, room})

solution.approach: Introduce a small, pure, side-effect-free helper module that handles every plausible input shape. Replace direct object rendering in the detail dialog with calls to the helper. Keep all API semantics, parser/importer logic, and DB schema unchanged.

filesCreated.purpose: Defensive formatters that coerce unknown values to safe string representations
Static checks + in-process behavioral eval of the helper functions across every input shape

changes: replaced inline parseWarningsArray helper with normalizeImportWarnings(batch.warnings)
replaced {w} with formatImportWarning(w) for both warnings and quality.warnings lists
wrapped filename, strategy, and errorMessage with formatImportDisplayValue for defense-in-depth
raw-JSON view now serializes the original batch.warnings payload
added 12 K34-A1-related checks: helper file exists, helper exports, content imports, content uses formatter at render sites, no raw {w} pattern

formatImportDisplayValue.purpose: Coerce any value to a safe human-readable string. Never throws, never returns an object.

formatImportWarning.purpose: Render a single warning (string or ImportParseWarning-shaped object) as a multi-line readable string with type, message, recordIndex, className/courseName/teacher/room context.
formatImportWarning.exampleOutput:
[DUPLICATE_CANDIDATE] 第 5 条：疑似重复
班级：森防1班
课程：防火
教室：A101

normalizeImportWarnings.purpose: Normalize batch.warnings from any shape (string[], object[], payload wrapper, JSON string, single object, null) into a uniform string[].

mustPass: no {w} in content (would render raw object)
content uses formatImportWarning in detail warnings list
content uses formatImportWarning in quality.warnings list
view-detail 详情 button still present

formatImportWarning handles 11 input cases (string, number, boolean, null, undefined, object with type+message+recordIndex, object with class/course/room context, missing recordIndex, no type or message, array of objects, nested object with deep message)

normalizeImportWarnings handles 10 input cases (string[], object[], payload wrapper, JSON string of array, JSON string of wrapper, null, undefined, plain string, single-object wrapper, nested object with warnings array)
详情 button still present in batch list table

manualSteps: Click 详情 on a 已废弃 batch (filter by 失败/废弃)
Verify detail dialog opens without React runtime error
Verify warnings list shows safe-formatted text (not raw object)
Verify quality warnings shows safe-formatted text
Toggle 展开/收起 原始 JSON
Verify list filter / 刷新 still work
Switch to USER account — verify no admin access

closureDecision.recommendedNextStage: K34-A2 (optional: fold cross-cohort approval UI into confirm flow) or K34-B (full management)
